curriculum.description: Complete Embedded Systems Career Guide - From Fundamentals to Industry Expert

stages.title: Introduction to Embedded Systems
stages.subtitle: Foundation & Basics
stages.description: Learn what embedded systems are, their applications, and basic concepts

stages.title: Digital Electronics Fundamentals
stages.subtitle: Logic & Circuits
stages.description: Master digital logic, number systems, and basic electronic components

stages.title: Microprocessor Architecture
stages.subtitle: CPU Fundamentals
stages.description: Understand CPU architecture, instruction sets, and processing concepts

stages.title: Microcontroller Basics
stages.subtitle: MCU Fundamentals
stages.description: Learn microcontroller architecture and popular MCU families

stages.title: C Programming for Embedded
stages.subtitle: Programming Fundamentals
stages.description: Master C programming specifically for embedded systems development

stages.title: GPIO and Basic I/O
stages.subtitle: Input/Output Control
stages.description: Learn to control LEDs, buttons, and basic input/output operations

stages.title: Timers and PWM
stages.subtitle: Time-based Control
stages.description: Master timing operations, PWM generation, and time-critical applications

stages.title: ADC and Analog Interfaces
stages.subtitle: Analog Signal Processing
stages.description: Work with analog sensors and digital conversion techniques

stages.title: Communication Protocols
stages.subtitle: Serial Communication
stages.description: Master UART, SPI, I2C, and other communication protocols

stages.title: Interrupts and Events
stages.subtitle: Event-Driven Programming
stages.description: Understand interrupt handling and event-driven system design

stages.title: Memory Management
stages.subtitle: Storage & Optimization
stages.description: Learn memory types, management techniques, and optimization strategies

stages.title: Real-Time Operating Systems
stages.subtitle: RTOS Fundamentals
stages.description: Introduction to RTOS concepts, task scheduling, and multitasking

stages.title: Wireless Communication
stages.subtitle: IoT Connectivity
stages.description: Explore wireless protocols for IoT and connected devices

stages.title: Advanced Projects
stages.subtitle: System Integration
stages.description: Build complex projects integrating multiple concepts and technologies

stages.title: Industry Readiness
stages.subtitle: Professional Skills
stages.description: Develop professional embedded systems engineering skills and career preparation
